raw: Each pass may be redeemed for up to two adult tickets ($15 each) and four youth tickets ($10 each). Children 6 and under are admitted free. You can purchase timed tickets before your visit using a promo code, or show the pass confirmation email from the library at time of visit. This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the library to pick it up. Please make sure you enter your current email address when making your reservation.

source_phrases.free_under_age: Children 6 and under are admitted free
